name: Shells with Tuna, Broccoli, and Red Onion
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Broccoli Florets and Stems, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet over low heat. Stir in onion and garlic. Saute for 2 minutes (garlic shouldn't brown and onion should be slightly crunchy). Remove from heat.
2. Add tuna, lemon juice, parsley, lemon zest, oregano, and black pepper to the skillet.
3. Cook the shells in plenty of boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Add the broccoli; cook until pasta is al dente and broccoli is tender, about 5 to 7 more minutes.
4. Remove 1/4 cup of the pasta cooking water and stir into the tuna sauce. Drain the pasta, toss with the tuna mixture, and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
